g.text: Subtitle text for descriptions and summaries
Body large text for paragraphs and descriptions
Body medium is the default text size for UI content
Body small is used for secondary information and metadata
Footnote text for disclaimers and fine print
Light — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Normal — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Medium — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Semibold — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Bold — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Base: border-radius 6px · inline-flex · align-items center · justify-content center
trigger: padding 6px 12px · radius 6px · dropdown: radius 8px · shadow-dropdown · option: padding 10px 14px
container: gap 6px · padding 6px 10px · radius 6px · chip: bg #F3F4F6 radius 4px · suggestions: radius 6px shadow-popover
inline-flex · border: 1px solid #E3E8EF · radius: 8px · option: padding 6px 16px radius 6px · active: bg #ecf3fc color #4185DE weight 600 · shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(65,133,222,0.12)
flex · space-between · padding: 0 4px · border-bottom: 1px solid #E3E8EF · bg: #FFF
absolute · top: 44px · right: 0 · min-width: 160px · bg: white · padding: 8px 0 · radius: 6px · shadow: popover
width: 260px · bg: #FFF · border-right: 1px solid #E3E8EF · flex column
overlay: rgba(0,0,0,0.4) + blur(2px) · drawer: 260px · fixed left 0 · border-right: 1px #ddd · bg: #FFF
padding: 12px 16px · bg: #FFF · border-bottom: 1px solid #E3E8EF · flex column
PROJECT ITEM — NO CHECKBOX, WITH METADATA
border-left: 3px solid transparent · active: bg #F3F4F6 + border-left #4185DE · overdue: border-left #ef4444 + bg rgba(254,226,226,0.35)
Add your first item to get started
All possible metadata indicator chips used in Item subtitles
flex, gap: 8px | chip: inline-flex, gap: 4px | icon: 20×20 (4px padding) | text: 14px
Overlay + centered dialog with title, content, and action buttons
Select a destination for this item.
Confirmation dialog for destructive actions — title, message, Cancel / Confirm buttons
Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Cancel: ghost sm, Confirm: danger sm
Desktop dropdown menu with items, icon items, and danger items
Stacked toast notifications — error (red) and success (green)
Page content area (toasts appear fixed at bottom center)
Network error: please check your connection
Inline quick-add — collapsed button expands to text input on click
Multi-step GTD clarify wizard — header with progress, step content, keyboard navigation
Can you take a physical action on this item?
keyboard: Y/N for actionable, Escape to cancel, Backspace to go back
steps: Actionable? → Count? → Two-minute? → Create Action/Project
Auth modal — login, register, forgot password, reset password modes with backdrop blur
Use 8 or more characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
Start your journey to better clarity and control.

and we'll send you a reset link.
Remember your password? Back to login
Small inline action button for list item actions — danger, primary, and default variants
Text + link inline component — centered block with contextual text and clickable action
Already have an account? Sign In
Remember your password? Back to login
Circular avatar — shows image or fallback with initials derived from email, HSL-hashed color
fallback: initials from first 2 chars of email, uppercase
color: hsl(hash % 360, 45%, 72%), text: white, font: sm semibold
Color-coded icon per GTD entity type — Stuff (inbox), Action (next), Project
svg size: 20px with 2px padding, box-sizing: border-box
Move-to dropdown for relocating items between GTD buckets — context-aware destinations
trigger: 28×28 btn, icon 18px, color tertiary → action on hover
context-aware: stuff shows all, action hides current state
Context modal for move actions requiring extra input — schedule date, waiting-for person, project outcome
overlay: fixed inset 0, bg overlay, z-index 99998
dialog: radius 12px, padding 24px, min-width 320px, max-width 400px, shadow-modal
types: schedule (date + optional time/duration), waiting (text), outcome (textarea)
actions: flex end, gap 8px, Cancel (ghost sm) + Confirm (primary sm)
auto-focus: date/text/textarea on open, Enter to confirm, Escape to close
RRULE builder — frequency, interval, day picker (weekly), end condition, summary text
layout: flex column, gap 12px, rows flex center gap 12px
label: min-width 90px, color secondary, font-weight semibold
day buttons: padding 4px 10px, radius 6px, active: bg #4185DE, color white
end: never | count (After N times) | until (date)
Global context filter — filter icon with dropdown, active tag chip with remove, border-bottom separator
container: flex center, gap 6px, padding-bottom 10px, border-bottom 1px #E3E8EF
trigger icon: 28px with 4px padding, color secondary → action when active
chip: padding 2px 8px, radius 12px, bg secondary, border #E3E8EF
dropdown item active: bg secondary, color action, font-weight semibold
Multi-select tag filter — icon button, checkmark list, removable chips, context-locked tags
trigger: Btn variant="icon", active color: action
context chip: bg action, color white (locked, not removable)
check: ✓ in action color, 18px width center
Dismissible GTD methodology tip banner — info and quote variants with left border accent
Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them. Capture everything into your inbox.
"You can do anything, but not everything." — David Allen
quote variant: border-left-color tertiary (#9CA3AF), font-style italic
close button: font-size lg, color tertiary → primary on hover
Empty state shown when context/tag filter yields no results — icon, title, descriptive text
File attachment list — upload via click/drag, file list with icon, download/delete actions, progress bar
limit: 10 attachments, max file size: 50 MB
file item: flex center, gap 10px, padding 8px 4px, border-bottom #E3E8EF
icon: 24px RefFileIcon, actions visible on hover (always on touch)
drop zone active: bg secondary, border dashed action, color action

limit: 50 comments, max 2000 chars per comment
textarea: border #D1D5DB, focus border action, rows 1→3 on focus
